title: Kazakh Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: Adds Kazakh dishes, drinks and ingredients to Farmer's Delight!
body:
# Kazakh Delight

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38ff0422bb1394dd242a9e2ef51549f470bd3c06.png)

**Kazakh delight** is a mod that expands **Farmer's Delight** dishes with Kazakh traditinoal plates such as Beshbarmak, Lagman, Koumiss and more! Also you can try Horse meat and Mare milk.

[Dependencies]:

You will need **Farmers Delight** and **NeoForge** to run this mod, and optionally but highly recommended **JEI**!

[Credits]:

Developed by **Obdisian_**

Thanks to **Zcript** and **Ut1L_** for creating the textures!
